docket_entries.description: ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. (CURRENT HEARING AUG-10-2021)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-25-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-13-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF GREGORY COTTRELL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PATRICK WILLIAMS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $986.00 IS REACHED. DEFENDANT IS TO PAY PLAINTIFF $490.00 BY AUG-30-21. FINAL PAYMENT OF $491.00 IS DUE ON SEP-30-21. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE THROUGH VENMO. NO APPEARANCE IS REQURIED IF PAYMENTS ARE MADE AS AGREED AND THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDCIE AS SETTLED. AN APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF PAYMENS ARE NOT MADE AS AGREED AND JUGMENT WILL BE ISSUED. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,267.55 FILED BY COTTRELL, GREGORY AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, PATRICK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-10-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT
